nodes.label: ForgeOps
nodes.rationale: Self-service platform-engineering portal where engineering teams scaffold services from curated templates, generate production-ready deployment artifacts, run DevSecOps checks, and monitor rollouts with an AI copilot.

nodes.label: Monorepo Architecture
nodes.rationale: pnpm workspaces + Turborepo monorepo structure chosen to colocate frontend, backend, and shared packages.

nodes.label: Backend Stack
nodes.rationale: NestJS + Prisma + PostgreSQL 16 + Redis 7 + BullMQ chosen as the backend technology stack.

nodes.label: Frontend Stack
nodes.rationale: Next.js 15 (App Router) + Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui + TanStack Query chosen as the frontend technology stack.

nodes.label: Shared Zod Schemas
nodes.rationale: Zod schemas in packages/types are the single source of truth for both frontend and backend.

nodes.label: Provider Interfaces
nodes.rationale: Every external integration sits behind a provider interface in apps/api/src/providers/. Switch from mock to real with config, not a refactor.

nodes.label: AI Is Optional Pattern
nodes.rationale: Gated by FEATURE_AI_COPILOT_ENABLED. Product demos end-to-end with no API key thanks to a deterministic analyzer that is always available.

nodes.label: Artifact Generation
nodes.rationale: Real artifact generation producing valid Dockerfile, K8s, Helm, CI, Argo YAML from Handlebars templates.

nodes.label: Cost Estimation
nodes.rationale: Real math against a configurable pricing table; future integration with cloud billing APIs.

nodes.label: Auth and RBAC
nodes.rationale: JWT (access+refresh) in httpOnly cookies, bcrypt. Future SSO/SAML integration planned.

nodes.label: DevSecOps
nodes.rationale: Security scans, cost estimation, metrics, and logs integrated into the platform.

nodes.label: Handlebars Templates
nodes.rationale: Handlebars chosen as template engine for generating deployment artifacts (Dockerfile, K8s manifests, Helm values, CI pipelines, ArgoCD applications).

nodes.label: Template Context Schema
nodes.rationale: Templates receive service, version, workspace, and environment context objects for artifact generation.

nodes.label: Ports and Adapters Pattern
nodes.rationale: Ports-and-adapters (hexagonal) seam between domain layer and outside world. Each surface has interface, mock impl, optional real stub, and Nest module. Factory picks impl from ConfigService.
